title: carex × ungavensis
intro: Carex × ungavensis, a hybrid plant species, is a type of sedgy grass commonly found in wetlands and bogs. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Carex × ungavensis include its ability to ease congestion and promote healthy breathing, as well as its potential to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
